en-US.title: Hunty
en-US.subtitle: Stellar treasure hunts on the go
en-US.description:
Hunty turns your city into a blockchain-powered treasure hunt. Discover active hunts, solve clues, scan QR codes, and compete for XLM and NFT rewards — all from your phone.

Features:
• Browse live hunts from the Hunty indexer
• Connect your Stellar wallet (xBull, Lobstr)
• Track progress and claim rewards
• Dark mode and accessibility-friendly UI
en-US.releaseNotes: Initial TestFlight release with hunts feed, wallet connect, and core navigation.

review.notes: Connect a Stellar testnet wallet to join hunts. No purchase required for core gameplay.

en-US.title: Hunty
en-US.shortDescription: Stellar treasure hunts — solve clues, earn XLM & NFTs.
en-US.fullDescription:
Hunty turns your city into a blockchain-powered treasure hunt. Discover active hunts, solve clues, scan QR codes, and compete for XLM and NFT rewards.

• Browse live hunts
• Connect Stellar wallets
• Track hunt progress
• Claim on-chain rewards
